title: Hand painted Cellu Club Cels
wikitext:
[]: Hand-painted Cellu Club Cels             Quote Post by farbissenah » Sat Aug 28, 2010 10:30 pm Hey everyone. I'm a fan of Evangelion but not as big as I used to be. I'm moving soon and hoping to put together some funds as a buffer between moving costs and so forth, so I've decided to sell some of my animation cels to people who will probably appreciate them more than me. Pardon the case's condition, it has been lamenting in my closet for ten years. I'll clean it up before I send them anywhere (they share a case however.) Cels are in perfect condition, despite the case being musty/dirty. I'd prefer to sell them as a set but will split them up if need be. I also only take paypal, if that helps. I'm not sure what these retail for, but I would like at least $150-$200 a piece for them since I paid quite a bit for them as it was back in the day. I'll take offers, however. Here are pictures... I mosaiced out the price since I am not asking what I paid and it is more than that. It'd be nice, not going to lie, but that's a long shot in the dark. Asuka: http://pics.livejournal.com/rosicrucian/pic/0031q36g http://pics.livejournal.com/rosicrucian/pic/00319a9q (detail) Rei: http://pics.livejournal.com/rosicrucian/pic/0031rhzg http://pics.livejournal.com/rosicrucian/pic/0031bzw4 (detail) Unique piece of merchandise, all things considered. I'm amazed by the details, I just don't appreciate them as much as fan should. [/url:2in1rfyq]

[]: That Asuka cell is simply darling. NO HOMO.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Sat Aug 28, 2010 10:51 pm Damn, I'd sure love to get my hands on those. Unfortunately, I wouldn't be able to offer enough money for them and I wouldn't feel right asking for anything less than they're worth. Hopefully you'll find a good home for them.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Sat Aug 28, 2010 10:52 pm Soooo.... did someone paint these? on like a special cell paper? Sorry to sound ignorant.

[]: Y'know, like... the actual things they... nevermind.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Sat Aug 28, 2010 10:55 pm IrkenEvangelion wrote: Soooo.... did someone paint these? on like a special cell paper? Sorry to sound ignorant.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Sat Aug 28, 2010 10:57 pm Actual originals?

[]: [insert clever witticism here]             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Sat Aug 28, 2010 10:58 pm IrkenEvangelion wrote: Actual originals?

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Sat Aug 28, 2010 11:00 pm hmm... I may need to find a couple hundred dollars sometime soon... That seems like the ultimate Eva fan collectible.

[]:             Quote Post by farbissenah » Sat Aug 28, 2010 11:00 pm IrkenEvangelion wrote: Soooo.... did someone paint these? on like a special cell paper? Sorry to sound ignorant.

[]: I'll just get my coat.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Sat Aug 28, 2010 11:01 pm farbissenah wrote: Yes, they were painted by hand. You can sort of tell if you look at the detail pictures but admittedly my camera does not take good macro shots. They aren't "production" cels persay, but very, very limited edition reproduction pieces that the Cellu Club sold. They are done like normal "cels" were back in the day, transparent plastic "paper" with the pictures painted on. Unlike production cels, though, they saw much less wear-and-tear (which is a plus), but they also do not come with the "sketches" that sometimes accompany actual production cels.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Sat Aug 28, 2010 11:03 pm Well that makes a little more sense. Thank you for the long explanation. I will definitely have to look into these.

[]:             Quote Post by farbissenah » Sat Aug 28, 2010 11:16 pm You're welcome. They're very nice pieces, just hoping I can find them a good home soon. :)

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Sun Aug 29, 2010 9:10 am I saw the link for these the other day, and they look fantastic. I would really love to buy them but I can't justify spending that much money on prints without seeing them first-hand first, which I am unable to do because I live very, very far away. Anyway, if I were you, I would really reconsider selling those, as they are really really cool.

[]:             Quote Post by farbissenah » Sun Aug 29, 2010 3:21 pm Not much into anime at all anymore, which is why they'd be best in someone else's hands? Haven't enjoyed a series in 3+ years. :( Thanks for looking, though.

[]:             Quote Post by z23 » Wed Sep 01, 2010 11:04 am i think you should lower your estimations. Not to sound rude as i love them but i was looking into getting the whole set and for that price i dont think you will sell them :s

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Webster » Wed Sep 01, 2010 8:31 pm Hello fellow Minnesotan! Some days I think I'm the only one on here. In the unlikely event someone from here doesn't want to pick up those cels, you might want to see if Tomodachi in the Rosedale Center mall might be willing to take them on consignment. About 9 months ago someone did that with their whole NGE collection, and it was apparently all sold in just a few days (I never got to see any of what was for sale, despite the fact I check out that store pretty much every week).
